response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Resume shows roughly 13-16 years depending on counting, no advanced AI degree, no demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale, no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product strategy at a Principal level. Current title is Senior/Staff, not Principal, and the AI work is recent and peripheral.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows
Track record of founding an open-source platform, speaking, and running workshops — shows initiative and thought-sharing
concerns: No recognized AI expertise, no AI products/platforms built at scale, no Master's/PhD in an AI field
Seniority gap — Senior/Staff IC trajectory, not Principal/Director-level strategic IC
Limited evidence of cloud platform strategy work or advising strategic customers/partners on cutting-edge tech

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
